servinfo.title: Sheet Metal Description
servinfo.ptxt: This section contains information for body repair (welding) work.

attention3.ptxt: All the numbered panels in figure are supplied available as spare parts.

entry.ptxt: Front seat rear inside center bracket
Rear floor side member rear reinforcement (R)
Rear floor side member rear reinforcement (L)
Front door hinge upper retainer (R, L)
Front door hinge lower retainer (R, L)
Rear door hinge upper reinforcement (R, L)
Rear door hinge lower reinforcement (R, L)
Rear door hinge upper retainer (R, L)
Rear door hinge lower retainer (R, L)
Rear lamp house inner panel (R, L)
Rear wheel house front reinforcement (R, L)
Side sill strength front reinforcement (R, L)
Rear lamp house outer panel (R, L)
Side body outer (A pillar) panel (R, L)
Side body outer (B pillar) panel (R, L)
Side body outer (Side sill) panel (R, L)
Roof panel center No. 2 member (Without sun roof model only)
Roof panel center No. 1 member (Without sun roof model only)
Sliding roof reinforcement (With sun roof model only)
